text.title: Product-Led Growth (PM Angle) Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Dev-tool aha = first successful API call
example.code: product_id: acme-api aha_moment: event_sequence: [api_key_created, api_call_succeeded] max_minutes_from_signup: 8 pql_criteria: events: [api_call_succeeded] frequency: '>=10/week' account_shape: 'company_size > 10' activation_cohort_tracked: true expansion_owner: pm experiment_throttle: {max_concurrent_per_step: 2}
example.note: Illustrates aha-moment-instrumented + pql-criteria-written + activation-cohort + expansion-revenue-owned + throttle.

example.title: Vague aha + signup-cohort conversion + sales-owned expansion
